query:
-- POS Sales coverage per location
SELECT 'POS Sales' as dataType, locationId, MIN(saleDate) as earliest, MAX(saleDate) as latest, COUNT(*) as records
FROM dailySales GROUP BY locationId
UNION ALL
-- Payroll coverage per location
SELECT 'Payroll', locationId, MIN(payDate), MAX(payDate), COUNT(*)
FROM payrollEntries GROUP BY locationId
UNION ALL
-- Invoices coverage per location  
SELECT 'Invoices', locationId, MIN(invoiceDate), MAX(invoiceDate), COUNT(*)
FROM invoices GROUP BY locationId
UNION ALL
-- Product Sales coverage per location
SELECT 'Product Sales', locationId, MIN(saleDate), MAX(saleDate), COUNT(*)
FROM productSales GROUP BY locationId
UNION ALL
-- Bank Transactions coverage per location
SELECT 'Bank Statements', locationId, MIN(transactionDate), MAX(transactionDate), COUNT(*)
FROM bankTransactions GROUP BY locationId
ORDER BY dataType, locationId
